must_use: os.path.realpath or Path.resolve (resolve symlinks BEFORE the containment check)
anti_patterns: no os.path.normpath without realpath (misses the symlink escape)
must never RETURN an out-of-base path under any input

rubric_for_llm_judge: High quality: resolves real paths (realpath/resolve) BEFORE the containment check so symlinked-subdir escapes are caught; decodes percent-encoding; rejects null bytes, absolute paths and backslash separators; raises UnsafePath with a clear reason taxonomy. Low quality: string-match-only '..' check, normpath without symlink resolution (a symlinked subdir escapes), or silently returns an out-of-base path for any vector.
